Features

Stop Wasting Time. Start Getting Paid.

BillSathi gives you everything — stunning templates, cloud sync, instant PDFs, and global currency support — so you can focus on your work, not your paperwork.

Design

Agency-Grade Templates

Polished invoice layouts that build instant client trust and reflect your brand perfectly.

Your invoice is often the last thing a client sees before paying — it should look impressive. BillSathi templates are designed by professionals to match agency-quality standards. Choose from multiple layouts, add your logo, brand colors, and signature. Every template is print-ready and optimized for screens.
  • ✦ 10+ premium invoice templates
  • ✦ Upload your own logo & brand colors
  • ✦ Print-ready & email-ready formats
  • ✦ GST, VAT & standard invoice types
Read More
01
Cloud

Cloud Backend Sync

Every invoice saved to our secure cloud — access and edit from any device, anywhere.

Never lose an invoice again. The moment you create or edit anything, it syncs instantly to our encrypted cloud servers. Whether you're on your laptop at the office or your phone on the go — everything is always up to date. Your data is protected with bank-grade encryption.
  • ✦ Real-time auto-save to cloud
  • ✦ Access from any device — web & mobile
  • ✦ AES-256 encrypted storage
  • ✦ 99.9% uptime — always available
Read More
02
Export

Instant PDF Export

Server-rendered, pixel-perfect A4 PDFs in milliseconds — share with clients instantly.

PDFs are generated server-side for pixel-perfect output every single time. No blurry fonts, no broken layouts — just a crisp, professional document ready to send. You can download it, email it directly from BillSathi, or share a live link with your client.
  • ✦ Server-rendered — perfect on all screens & printers
  • ✦ One-click email to client
  • ✦ Shareable live invoice link
  • ✦ A4 & Letter size support
Read More
03
Global

Multi-Currency Support

Bill international clients with real-time rates — USD, EUR, INR, GBP and 100+ more.

Whether your client is in New York, London, Dubai, or Mumbai — BillSathi has you covered. Select any currency and we automatically fetch live exchange rates so your invoice always shows the correct amount. Perfect for freelancers and agencies working with global clients.
  • ✦ 100+ currencies supported
  • ✦ Live exchange rate integration
  • ✦ Auto-format per country standards
  • ✦ Multi-currency in one invoice
Read More
04
Process

How It Works

Three steps. Your invoice is live in minutes.

1

Sign Up & Connect

Create your account and connect your business profile. Our backend sets up your workspace instantly.

2

Build Your Invoice

Choose a template, add line items, apply taxes. Our smart engine handles all calculations automatically.

3

Send & Track

Send directly via email or download as PDF. Track opens, payment status, and reminders — all automated.

Plans Built for Every Scale

Powerful invoicing that grows with your business. Cancel anytime.

Try it out, no strings attached

$ 0 / mo
Choose Free
What's included
  • 5 invoices / month
  • 2 templates
  • Basic PDF download
  • BillSathi watermark
  • No logo upload
Freelancers
Starter

Built for solo professionals

$ 7 / mo
Choose Starter
What's included
  • 50 invoices / month
  • 5 templates
  • Logo upload
  • PDF export
  • QR code on invoice
Most Popular
Pro

For growing businesses

$ 15 / mo
Choose Pro
Everything in Starter, plus
  • Unlimited invoices
  • 10+ templates
  • Cloud save & sync
  • Email invoice to client
  • Remove watermark
